# Based-Employee-Management-System
A Python-based Employee Management System built using Pandas and Excel with role-based access control and data persistence.

## 📌 Features

* 🔐 Login system with **3-attempt retry limit**
* 👑 Role-based access:
* Admin → Add, Delete, Update, Save
* User → View & Search only
* ➕ Add employee records with auto-generated ID
* 🗑️ Delete employee records
* 🔍 Search employee by ID
* 📋 Display all employee data
* 💾 Save data to Excel (`.xlsx`)
* 📂 Auto-load existing data on startup
* 🕒 Login timestamp tracking

---

## 📊 Tech Stack

* Python
* Pandas
* Excel

---

## 🔐 Login Credentials

| Role  | Username | Password |
| ----- | -------- | -------- |
| Admin | admin    | 1234     |
| User  | user     | 0000     |

---
